page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Foldseek: fast and accurate protein structure search
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Foldseek enables fast and sensitive comparisons of large structure sets. It reaches sensitivities similar to state-of-the-art structural aligners while being at least 20,000 times faster.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Foldseek enables fast and sensitive comparisons of large structure sets. It reaches sensitivities similar to state-of-the-art structural aligners while being at least 20,000 times faster.
